description: Let T_n be a rooted tree constructed in the following way. With k_0 = n as the root, let k_i be a vertex of depth i. For each prime divisor p of k_i, the children of k_i are those m = k_i + (-1)^i*k_i/p, where m >= 1 and m does not appear in the path from k_0 to k_i. a(n) is the number of paths in T_n.
